summary: Made surgical end-of-chapter continuity tweaks so Chapter 2's opening fridge-schedule image and lunch-slot emphasis land as a direct continuation.
edits: Specified the rewritten schedule as thick black-stroke text to match the next chapter's visual framing.
Added an `EAT` lunch-slot marking on the schedule for direct carryover into Chapter 2.
